about.title: About AVIKONTEX
about.description: AVIKONTEX is focused on supplying clinical technologies, diagnostics, and medical equipment. The website provides fast selection, cart, and order flow for clinics.
about.card1Text: Reliable products suited for clinical practice with clearly listed technical parameters.
about.card2Text: Specialist support for selection, delivery, and commissioning.
about.card3Text: Quick access to 6,000+ products by category and price.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.description: Answers to the most common questions about the store and orders.

items.q: How do I place an order?
items.a: Add the product to the cart, go to the checkout page, enter your contact and address details, and confirm the order.
At the moment, cash on delivery and bank transfer are available. Online payment integration will be added in the next stage.

items.q: Can I track my order status?
items.a: Yes. After the order is confirmed, an order number is generated and the tracking page becomes available.
In Tashkent it is usually delivered the same day or the next day. For other regions, it takes 2-4 business days.

items.q: What happens if a product is out of stock?
items.a: Out-of-stock products are marked separately and cannot be added to the cart.

faq.noResults: No questions found for this filter.

p1.name: Portable ultrasound scanner X8
p1.description: A high-precision ultrasound device for small clinics and mobile diagnostic teams.
p1.material: Digital B/W and Color Doppler technology

p2.name: Digital X-ray sensor DR17
p2.description: Flat-panel X-ray sensor with fast capture and low radiation exposure.

p3.name: Bedside patient monitor PM10
p3.description: Continuously tracks heart rhythm, SpO2, NIBP, and respiration at the bedside.

p4.name: ICU multiparameter monitor MP12
p4.description: Advanced monitoring and alarm functions for intensive care departments.
p4.material: Extended EtCO2, IBP, and Temp modules

p5.name: Hematology analyzer HA320
p5.description: Stable and fast laboratory device for blood samples with 3-part differential analysis.

p6.name: Biochemistry analyzer BA200
p6.description: Compact system designed for high-throughput biochemical testing.

p7.name: Electrosurgical unit ESU-400
p7.description: Provides safe electrosurgery with coagulation and cutting modes.

p8.name: LED surgical light SkyLED
p8.description: Professional operating light system with shadow-free illumination and high color rendering.
p8.material: Multi-segment LED module and sensor control

p9.name: Plasma sterilizer PS60
p9.description: Safe low-temperature sterilization for delicate medical instruments.

p11.name: Rehabilitation treadmill RT5
